data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Data is encrypted in transit and at rest to safeguard user information.
data.technical_spec: Uses TLS for data in transit and AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
data.description: MFA is implemented to enhance the security of user accounts.
data.technical_spec: Options include SMS, authenticator apps, and hardware tokens.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Routine audits and penetration tests are conducted to identify and mitigate vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Compliance with international security standards including ISO 27001.

data.title: Advanced Threat Detection
data.description: Uses AI and machine learning to detect and respond to threats in real-time.
data.technical_spec: Integrations with SIEM systems to monitor for and respond to anomalies.

data.title: Data Loss Prevention (DLP)
data.description: Mechanisms to prevent unauthorized data access or leaks.
data.technical_spec: Comprehensive DLP solutions track and manage data access and transfer across systems.
